changes.title: Canonical default appearance schema
changes.description: Added _defaultAppearance() returning a canonical object with all 29 Tier-2 appearance fields set to null (meaning 'use defaults'). All appearance read/write operations merge against this baseline to ensure forward compatibility as new fields are added in future versions.

changes.title: saveUserAppearance() — first write of appearance.json
changes.description: Implemented saveUserAppearance(uid, appearanceObj) — the low-level write pathway for users/{uid}/appearance.json. It reads the current file for its SHA to avoid conflicts, deep-merges with _defaultAppearance() for completeness, writes via ghPutJson, and updates the TTL cache. This is the first version where appearance.json can be written to the GitHub repo.

changes.title: Appearance draft state variables
changes.description: Added module-level _appearanceDraftUid, _appearanceDraft (working copy), and _appearanceDraftBase (last server state). These follow the same pattern as _styleDraft/_styleDraftBase for profile fields and persist across tab switches within a session.

changes.title: initAppearanceDraft(uid)
changes.description: Async initialiser that populates the appearance draft from the TTL cache (triggering a fetch if absent) and merges with _defaultAppearance() for completeness. Idempotent — if the draft is already loaded for the same uid, returns immediately.

changes.title: hasAppearanceDraftChanges()
changes.description: Returns true if any field in _appearanceDraft differs from _appearanceDraftBase. Array fields are compared via JSON.stringify for deep equality. Used to drive the appearance draft bar visibility (UI wiring in v1.0.0.5+).

changes.title: updateAppearanceDraft(fields)
changes.description: Merges an arbitrary fields object into _appearanceDraft without writing to cloud. Individual appearance editors (badge, glow, outline, etc.) will call this when fielding changes from their controls.

changes.title: commitAppearanceDraft(uid) + discardAppearanceDraft()
changes.description: commitAppearanceDraft writes the working draft to cloud via saveUserAppearance, updates both draft variables to the saved server state, and calls _propagateAppearanceChange for immediate local DOM updates. discardAppearanceDraft resets _appearanceDraft to _appearanceDraftBase, undoing all unsaved changes.
